hero.headline: Your Connection Refuge
hero.subheadline: Discover clothing that tells stories. Designed for you, inspired by the beach.

storefront.reviewsComingSoonDesc: Customer reviews will be available after launch.
storefront.noProductsHint: Try adjusting your filters or clearing your search.

cart.title: Shopping Cart
cart.emptyDesc: Add some products and come back here.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.thankYou: Thank you for your purchase. We'll notify you when your order ships.
checkout.name: Name
checkout.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields

admin.welcome: Select a section to get started.
admin.ordersDesc: View and manage all customer orders

marketing.noPages: No pages yet. Create your first page.
marketing.noPageSelectedDesc: Create a new page or select an existing one
marketing.selectPage: Select a page or create a new one
marketing.atLeastOneComponent: The page must have at least one component

seller.sellToClientDesc: Process a sale on behalf of a customer
seller.myActivityDesc: Track your shifts and clock in/out

sell.title: Sell to Client
sell.subtitle: Select a client, build their cart, and process the sale.
sell.searchClients: Search clients by name or email...
sell.notesPlaceholder: Add any notes about this sale...

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Edit prices, descriptions, images. Changes override defaults.

stock.title: Stock Management
stock.subtitle: Adjust quantities per product. Changes are saved to the database.

rotation.title: Product Rotation
rotation.subtitle: Schedule and manage when products cycle between Active, Paused, and Archived states.
rotation.archiveBulkConfirm: Archive {count} product(s)? This cannot be undone.
rotation.scheduleAllHint: Select "Schedule" on individual products to set specific dates per product.
rotation.errorPastDate: Scheduled date cannot be in the past.
rotation.errorSameStatus: New status must differ from the current status.

step-1.title: Your Shift Controls
step-1.description: Use the buttons here to clock in when your shift starts and clock out when it ends.

step-2.title: Activity Log
step-2.description: Every clock in, clock out, and completed task is recorded here in real time.

step-3.title: Need Help?
step-3.description: Click this button anytime to replay this tutorial.

step-1.title: Supervisor Dashboard
step-1.description: This is your control centre. Monitor team activity, review performance, and manage shifts in real time.

step-2.title: Team Chips
step-2.description: Each chip shows a worker and whether they are currently clocked in. Click any chip to see their details.

step-3.title: Worker Status Cards
step-3.description: These cards give you a live snapshot — who is working, how many hours logged, and total team activity.

step-4.title: Live Activity Feed
step-4.description: Every clock-in and clock-out appears here instantly. Use this to confirm your team is on schedule.

step-5.title: Sales Performance
step-5.description: See today's sales totals and revenue per seller at a glance. Identify your top performers.

step-6.title: Task Board
step-6.description: Assign tasks to your team, set priorities, and track completion. Drag cards between columns to update status.

step-7.title: Performance Rankings
step-7.description: This section ranks sellers by revenue, orders, and hours. Use it for performance reviews and incentives.

step-8.title: Alerts Panel
step-8.description: Any unusual activity — missed clock-outs, low stock, or flagged transactions — surfaces here for your review.

step-9.title: Approve Activity
step-9.description: Workers' clock-in and clock-out entries require your approval. Approve to confirm or reject to flag for follow-up.

step-10.title: Need Help?
step-10.description: Click this button anytime to replay this full tour.

step-1.title: Welcome to Admin
step-1.description: This is your central hub for managing Makay Store. Every tool you need is accessible from here.

step-2.title: Live Stats
step-2.description: This strip shows real-time totals — products in your catalog, orders this month, and sellers active today.

step-3.title: Products & 3D
step-3.description: Create products and generate 3D models from a single product photo using AI.

step-4.title: Orders
step-4.description: View every order placed by your sellers, filter by seller, and inspect order details.

step-5.title: Users & Roles
step-5.description: Assign roles to every user — customer, seller, supervisor, or admin. Role controls which panel they access.

step-6.title: Reports
step-6.description: Sales charts, cost/margin analysis, monthly goal tracking, and inventory health — all with real data.

step-7.title: Product Rotation
step-7.description: Schedule when products cycle between Active, Paused, and Archived. Keep your catalog fresh automatically.

step-8.title: Storefront Studio
step-8.description: One editor for everything: brand palette, scroll colors, per-page typography, content overrides, product images, and member card design.

step-9.title: Sidebar Navigation
step-9.description: The sidebar gives you instant access to all 7 sections — Panel, Products, Orders, Users, Reports, Rotation, and Studio.

step-10.title: Need Help?
step-10.description: Click this button anytime to replay this tour.

step-1.title: Reports & Analytics
step-1.description: Track sales, costs, goals, inventory, and rotation metrics all in one place.

step-2.title: Report Tabs
step-2.description: Switch between Sales, Costs, Goals, Inventory, and Rotation using these tabs.

step-3.title: Key Metrics
step-3.description: Each card shows a critical number with trend direction indicators.

step-4.title: Need Help?
step-4.description: Replay this tour anytime by clicking the help button.

step-1.title: Product Rotation
step-1.description: Schedule when products change between Active, Paused, and Archived states.

step-2.title: Product Table
step-2.description: All products are listed here with their current status. Click column headers to sort.

step-1.title: 3D Product Generator
step-1.description: Upload a product photo and an AI model will generate a 3D version automatically.

step-2.title: Step by Step
step-2.description: Follow the flow: select product → upload photo → generate → preview → confirm.

step-1.title: Theme Editor
step-1.description: Edit the look and feel of the entire storefront from here. Changes preview instantly — only Publish makes them live.

step-2.title: Four Control Areas
step-2.description: Colors controls the palette, Scroll sets per-section backgrounds, Images lets you change product photos, Card customises the member card.

step-3.title: Preset Themes
step-3.description: Pick a preset to instantly apply a full palette — Makay Default, Dark Luxury, Ocean Breeze, Sunset Coral, or Minimal White.

step-4.title: Live Preview
step-4.description: Every change is reflected here in real time before you publish.

step-5.title: Publish
step-5.description: When you're happy, click Publish. Your theme goes live on the store immediately.

step-1.title: Your Numbers
step-1.description: Revenue, orders, tracked products, and stock units — updated every time you visit.

step-2.title: Revenue Card
step-2.description: This is your total revenue from all sales you have processed. It includes all order totals.

step-3.title: Quick Actions
step-3.description: Jump straight to selling, managing products, updating stock, or viewing your shift activity.

step-4.title: Sell to Client
step-4.description: This is your primary tool. Use it to search for a client, add products, and complete a sale in 3 steps.

step-5.title: Recent Sales
step-5.description: Your latest completed sales appear here. Click any row to view the full order details.

step-6.title: Sidebar Navigation
step-6.description: Switch between Sell, Products, Stock, and Activity using the sidebar. Your current section is highlighted.

step-7.title: You're all set
step-7.description: Click this button anytime to replay this tour. Start by clicking 'Sell to Client' to process your first sale.

step-1.title: Product Management
step-1.description: Edit any product's price, description, image, or type. Changes here override store defaults.

step-2.title: Search Products
step-2.description: Filter by name or SKU to find products quickly.

step-3.title: Edit a Product
step-3.description: Click the pencil icon to edit price, image, description, or switch between Storefront and Dropshipping.

step-4.title: Add New Products
step-4.description: Use Add Product to create a brand-new item specific to your store.

step-1.title: Stock Management
step-1.description: Control how many units of each product are available.

step-2.title: Adjust Quantities
step-2.description: Use the +1, -1, +5, -5 buttons or type directly. Low stock (under 10) is highlighted in red.

step-3.title: Save Each Row
step-3.description: Hit Save on each row to persist that product's stock level to the database.

step-1.title: 3-Step Sale Process
step-1.description: Selling on behalf of a client takes 3 steps: select client, add products, then checkout.

step-2.title: Step 1 — Select Client
step-2.description: Search for the client by name or email and click their card to select them.

step-3.title: Storefront & Dropshipping
step-3.description: Mix Storefront products (shipped from stock) and Dropshipping products (shipped from supplier) in the same sale.

step-4.title: Complete the Sale
step-4.description: After adding products, proceed to checkout, choose a payment method, and complete the sale. The order is saved to the client's record.

step-1.title: Select a Page
step-1.description: Choose which store page to customize — Home, All Products, Product Detail, or Checkout.

step-2.title: Three Control Areas
step-2.description: Colors lets you override the palette for that page. Typography sets fonts and heading scale. Content edits the text fields.

step-3.title: Live Preview
step-3.description: Every change you make is reflected here instantly — see exactly how the page will look before publishing.

step-4.title: Publish Changes
step-4.description: When you are happy with the result, click Publish. Your changes go live on the store immediately.

step-1.title: Pick a Product
step-1.description: Select which product you want a 3D model for. Click any card to choose it.

step-2.title: Upload a Photo
step-2.description: Drag and drop a clean product photo — best results with a white or plain background.

step-3.title: AI Generation
step-3.description: Our AI converts your photo into a 3D mesh. This takes about 2–3 minutes — you can leave this page and come back.

step-4.title: Preview & Save
step-4.description: Rotate and inspect the 3D model. If it looks good, save it — it will appear on the product page for customers.

step-1.title: Your Profile
step-1.description: This is your Makay Beach Club profile. Your avatar is managed through your Clerk account settings.

step-2.title: Your Bio
step-2.description: Click Edit to add a short bio that appears on your member card.

step-3.title: Makay Wallet
step-3.description: Your wallet balance can be used for discounts and exclusive member benefits.

step-4.title: Your Member Card
step-4.description: This is your digital Makay Beach Club card. Share it or save it — the QR code lets staff verify your membership.

testimonial1.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonial1.text: Makay pieces are perfect for my lifestyle. The quality and design are unmatched!

testimonial2.name: Marcus Chen
testimonial2.text: Finally, fashion that aligns with my values. I love wearing clothes that make a difference.

testimonial3.name: Elena Rodriguez
testimonial3.text: The community here is incredible. I've met amazing people through Makay.
